inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $1.39B less capital spending $0.58B = $0.81B; normalized to ~$1.1B run-rate owner cash on 2.305B shares post-Berry merger [Assumption]
inputs.shares_source: Entity common stock shares outstanding 2,305,359,941 (10-K FY2025 filed 2025-08-15)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 includes two months of Berry Global; pro forma revenue ~$23.2B (10-K acquisition note). Owner cash normalized between filed $0.35/sh and synergy-run-rate ~$0.55/sh.

bear.notes: Integration delays; resin cost pass-through fails; leverage stays elevated

base.notes: Berry synergies phase in; 9M FY2026 revenue $17.1B (+72% YoY); operating income $1.25B (+36% YoY)

bull.notes: Full synergy capture; rigid packaging mix improves; deleveraging frees cash for buybacks

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Packaging PP&E and intangibles recorded at acquisition fair value; goodwill $10.4B from Berry merger (10-K)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating packaging manufacturer, not resource NAV

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Both flexible and rigid segments report positive operating income (Q3 FY2026 10-Q segment table)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Contract manufacturing tied to customer volumes, not disclosed backlog option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Minor equity-method investments; no material hidden holdco stakes (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dated legal recovery or trust distribution

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Sustainable packaging and healthcare packaging growth embedded in flexible segment revenue path [Assumption]

growth_explanation.mechanism: Berry Global merger (closed 2025-04-30) adds rigid consumer/healthcare packaging scale; synergy realization and resin pass-through drive owner-cash growth.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 acquisition note; Q3 FY2026 10-Q segment revenue
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: Integration costs exceed synergy run-rate; leverage above 3.5x EBITDA persists
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: Synergy program hits high case; FCF conversion improves as capex normalizes post-merger

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
